title: Button Hover Effect
description: Create a button that changes background color and lifts slightly on hover.
hint: Use transition on background and transform: translateY.
startingCode: .btn { padding: 12px 24px; background: #3b82f6; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; }
solution: .btn { padding: 12px 24px; background: #3b82f6; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .btn:hover { background: #1d4ed8; transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(59,130,246,0.4); }

title: Image Hover Overlay
description: Create an image that shows a dark overlay with text on hover.
hint: Use a positioned overlay with opacity transition.
startingCode: .img-container { position: relative; width: 200px; height: 200px; overflow: hidden; }
solution: .img-container { position: relative; width: 200px; height: 200px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 12px; } .overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s ease; } .img-container:hover .overlay { opacity: 1; }

title: Navigation Link Hover
description: Create nav links with an underline that animates from left to right on hover.
startingCode: nav a { color: #e0e0e0; text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 0; position: relative; }
solution: nav a { color: #e0e0e0; text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 0; position: relative; } nav a::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 2px; background: #3b82f6; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 0.3s ease; } nav a:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

title: Ripple Effect Button
description: Create a button with a ripple effect that emanates from the click position.
hint: Use a pseudo-element with scale animation triggered on click.
startingCode: .ripple-btn { position: relative; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 24px; background: #3b82f6; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; }
solution: .ripple-btn { position: relative; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 24px; background: #3b82f6; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; } .ripple-btn::after { content: ''; position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); width: 100px; height: 100px; margin-top: -50px; margin-left: -50px; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: scale(0); opacity: 1; } .ripple-btn:active::after { animation: ripple 0.6s ease-out; } @keyframes ripple { to { transform: scale(4); opacity: 0; } }
